nasb.text: Now when Moses went into the tent of meeting to speak with Him, he heard the voice speaking to him from above the mercy seat that was on the ark of the testimony, from between the two cherubim, so He spoke to him.

esv.text: And when Moses went into the tent of meeting to speak with the Lord, he heard the voice speaking to him from above the mercy seat that was on the ark of the testimony, from between the two cherubim; and it spoke to him.

cnv.text: 摩西進入會幕要與耶和華說話的時候，就聽見法櫃的施恩座上，二基路伯中間，有與他說話的聲音，是耶和華與他說話。

ccb.text: 每当摩西走进会幕要与耶和华说话时，便听见耶和华从约柜的施恩座上、两个基路伯天使中间对他说话。
